recommendations.title: Silent Trigger
recommendations.overview: Waxman is a former Special Forces soldier who is now working as a heavily armed assassin for a top secret government agency. When a covert mission goes terribly wrong, Waxman and fellow assassin Clegg become that agency's prime targets.

recommendations.title: Section 8
recommendations.overview: After avenging the murder of his family, a former soldier is sprung from prison and recruited by a shadowy government agency.

recommendations.title: Bent
recommendations.overview: On his latest private investigation, a shamed former cop connects a murder case to a government conspiracy involving rogue agents from a top spy agency.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: Heroes Wanted
recommendations.overview: Agents from diverse Spanish local police forces are called to form a special team.

recommendations.title: Blood Glacier
recommendations.overview: At a climate research station in the Alps, the scientists are stunned as the nearby melting glacier is leaking a red liquid. It quickly turns to be very special juice — with unexpected genetic effects on the local wildlife.

recommendations.title: The Artifice Girl
recommendations.overview: A team of special agents discovers a revolutionary new computer program to bait and trap online predators. After teaming up with the program's troubled developer, they soon find that the AI is rapidly advancing beyond its original purpose.

recommendations.title: Mute Witness
recommendations.overview: When a mute makeup/special effects artist working on a low-budget slasher film gets locked in a dilapidated Moscow movie studio late one night, she thinks she witnesses the making of a snuff film. Thus begins a night of terror.

recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: A drifting ex-soldier turns underground fighter with the help of a just-released ex-con, pitting him against corrupt cops and hired killers now gunning for him and all those he cares about.

recommendations.title: Hunter Will Get You
recommendations.overview: L'Alpagueur is a free-lance spy from the French secret agency. He's put on the investigation about L'epervier, a serial-killer who employs young boys to help him robbing banks before killing them.
